input.prompt: This .NET solution has grown organically and the build infrastructure needs attention. Review all project files and suggest how to improve the build organization. Focus on reducing duplication, improving maintainability, and applying MSBuild best practices.

1. <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
2. 
3.   <PropertyGroup>
4.     <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
5.     <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
6.     <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
7.     <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
8.     <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
9.     <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
10.     <Company>Contoso</Company>
11.     <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
12.   </PropertyGroup>
13. 
14.   <ItemGroup>
15.     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.0" />
16.     <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
17.   </ItemGroup>
18. 
19.   <PropertyGroup>
20.     <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
21.   </PropertyGroup>
22. 
23.   <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
24.     <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
25.   </Target>
26. 
27. </Project>
28.

diff --git a/tmp/sv-3f4cada513ed4dc19ccbd40e9c083bd0/src/ContosoApp.Core/ContosoApp.Core.csproj b/tmp/sv-3f4cada513ed4dc19ccbd40e9c083bd0/src/ContosoApp.Core/ContosoApp.Core.csproj
index 0000000..0000000 100644

+++ b/tmp/sv-3f4cada513ed4dc19ccbd40e9c083bd0/src/ContosoApp.Core/ContosoApp.Core.csproj
@@ -1,28 +1,28 @@
 <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
 
   <PropertyGroup>
     <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
     <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
     <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
     <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
     <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
     <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
     <Company>Contoso</Company>
     <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
   </PropertyGroup>
 
   <ItemGroup>
     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.0" />
     <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
   </ItemGroup>
 
   <PropertyGroup>
     <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
   </PropertyGroup>
 
   <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
     <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />

data.content:
Here's my analysis of the build infrastructure. I found significant duplication and several best-practice gaps across all 5 project files.

## Issues Found

### 1. Duplicated Properties (in all 5 projects)
Every `.csproj` repeats: `TargetFramework`, `LangVersion`, `Nullable`, `ImplicitUsings`, `TreatWarningsAsErrors`, `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild`, `Company`, `Authors`.

### 2. No Central Package Management
Package versions are scattered and **inconsistent**:
| Package | Core | Api | Services | Core.Tests | Api.Tests |
|---------|------|-----|----------|------------|-----------|
| `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions` | 8.0.0 | 8.0.0 | **8.0.1** | — | — |
| `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | — | — | — | 17.10.0 | **17.9.0** |
| `xunit` | — | — | — | 2.8.1 | **2.7.1** |
| `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | — | — | — | 2.8.1 | **2.5.6** |

### 3. Duplicated Custom Target
`PrintBuildInfo` is copy-pasted into all 3 `src/` projects.

### 4. Duplicated `DocumentationFile` Property
Same `<DocumentationFile>` line in all `src/` projects.

### 5. No `global.json`
No SDK version pinning — builds may behave differently across machines.

---

## Recommended Structure

```
/
├── global.json                    # Pin SDK version
├── Directory.Build.props          # Common properties for ALL projects
├── Directory.Packages.props       # Central Package Management
├── src/
│   └── Directory.Build.props      # Src-specific (DocumentationFile)
│   └── Directory.Build.targets    # Src-specific targets (PrintBuildInfo)
├── test/
│   └── Directory.Build.props      # Test-specific (IsPackable, test packages)
```

### `Directory.Build.props` (repo root) — shared settings
```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

### `Directory.Packages.props` (repo root) — central versioning
```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <!-- Test packages -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### `src/Directory.Build.props` — source project extras
```xml
<Project>
  <Import Project="$([MSBuild]::GetPathOfFileAbove('Directory.Build.props', '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)../'))" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

### `src/Directory.Build.targets` — shared custom target
```xml
<Project>
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

### `test/Directory.Build.props` — test project defaults
```xml
<Project>
  <Import Project="$([MSBuild]::GetPathOfFileAbove('Directory.Build.props', '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)../'))" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" />
    <PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### `global.json`
```json
{
  "sdk": {
    "version": "8.0.300",
    "rollForward": "latestFeature"
  }
}
```

---

## Result: Simplified Project Files

After these changes, `.csproj` files shrink dramatically:

**`ContosoApp.Core.csproj`** → only its unique packages:
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**`ContosoApp.Core.Tests.csproj`** → just its project reference:
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\..\src\ContosoApp.Core\ContosoApp.Core.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

---

## Summary of Benefits

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| 8 duplicated properties × 5 files | Defined once in root `Directory.Build.props` |
| Version drift across projects | Single source of truth in `Directory.Packages.props` |
| Copy-pasted targets | One `Directory.Build.targets` |
| Test boilerplate in each test project | Inherited from `test/Directory.Build.props` |
| No SDK pinning | `global.json` ensures reproducibility |

Would you like me to implement these changes?
data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture of the solution. Let me analyze the issues:

1. **No `Directory.Build.props`** - Every project repeats the same properties (TargetFramework, LangVersion, Nullable, ImplicitUsings, TreatWarningsAsErrors, EnforceCodeStyleInBuild, Company, Authors).

2. **No `Directory.Packages.props`** (Central Package Management) - Package versions are scattered across projects, and there are version inconsistencies:
   - `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions` is `8.0.0` in Core and Api, but `8.0.1` in Services
   - `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` is `17.10.0` in Core.Tests but `17.9.0` in Api.Tests
   - `xunit` is `2.8.1` in Core.Tests but `2.7.1` in Api.Tests
   - `xunit.runner.visualstudio` is `2.8.1` in Core.Tests but `2.5.6` in Api.Tests

3. **Duplicated custom target** - `PrintBuildInfo` target is duplicated in all 3 src projects.

4. **Duplicated `DocumentationFile` property** - Same across multiple projects.

I'm also noticing that there's no `Directory.Build.targets` file where common targets could live, test projects are repeating the same package dependencies and settings, and there's no `global.json` to pin the SDK version. I should put together a full set of recommendations to address all these inconsistencies.
